ground_truth.title: TAX ASSISTANCE | United Way of Pierce County
ground_truth.main_content: UWPC is committed to helping families reclaim the dollars that increase their families financial well being. 211 is also able to schedule in-person appointments with trained tax payers. Call or email 211@uwpc.org. File online at MyFreeTaxes.com - brought to you by United Way Worldwide. EITC support with 211. Working Families tax credit (if filing online, 211 support) - English. Working Families tax credit (if filing online, 211 support) - Spanish. VITA (Volunteer Income Tax Assistance) - see below. Download and Printable PDF of Tax Help.
